title: Exodo II

'''Exodo II''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], stormy, and dense [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]], near [[Durren]] and [[Odos]]. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] had a brief encounter with the world nine [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

In the early months of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion the Vong priestess [[Elan]] was [[Battle near Exodo II|captured]] by a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force present in the [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="AoCI:HT" /> Later during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Imperial Remnant]] attempted to protect the world, before it fell to the invaders.

In [[44 ABY]], the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] world was the site of a [[Battle over Exodo II|battle]] between the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[Maw Irregular Fleet]].<ref name="FOTJ8">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Ascension]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
